1704830.name: DR4X
1704830.description:
DR4X delivers fast, bite-sized, turn based 4X gameplay packed with endless choices and assymetric factions.

Finish a skirmish in under an hour, whether you're a Kingdom, Bandits, a Rat King, or a Dark Lord. From ruling kingdoms to managing Inns, to battling demonic goats.

The options are endless in DR4X.

Notable Features

  • Chaotic fast paced gameplay!

  • Story rich single player campaign with five endings, meta elements, and fully voiced briefings, where each mission has "standard" and "unconventional" victory!

  • Highly customizable skirmish mode with almost limitless options!

  • Asymmetric gameplay, No two factions play the same!

  • Faction-specific gameplay and goals!

  • A beautiful, original soundtrack.

  • You can pet a dog. (Yes, you read that right!)

The Game

DR4X includes an in-depth skirmish customizer, allowing you to design (and share) distinct fantasy settings complemented by a broad range of gameplay styles! Decide your realm's age, its savagery level, the types of bandits and kinds of monsters, invading dark forces, and much, much more! Occasionally, your skirmish settings even unlock new win conditions.

Once you've made your choices, the world is procedurally generated, incorporating elements like artifacts that are randomly created in accordance with the age of the realm.

After which you can dive into a lively ever-changing world where, without intervention, dens of beasts and camps of bandits will spread across the realm on their own, paired with unique random events that bring the world to life based on your settings.

Before jumping in you can choose your faction and each faction uses different resources and completely unique playstyles.

Research powerful technologies and utilize game changing "Tile Effects", such as the Cult's ability to do a "Mass Sacrifice" when building hideouts! Or the Kingdom's ability to Annex all surrounding buildings by building a guard house next to them!

Do you want to fight other empires? Or destroy  the monsters infesting the realm. Or maybe even be the monsters infesting the realm! It is all your choice!

If you're not inclined towards skirmishes, the game also offers a unique single-player campaign, complete with five endings and a series of unlockable missions. Each mission has voiced briefings, reminiscent of classic retro games, and has multiple 'routes' to victory. Set against the dramatic backdrop of a realm under a mysterious invasion, this campaign blends modern, story-intensive visual novel elements with completely unique meta horror aspects and 'Coffee Break' 4X gameplay. There are 5 different possible endings!

Everything is fine.

Its. Perfectly. Safe.

DR4X, An RBI Game.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
